---
pagetitle: "Inscriere | Idea Marathon"
---

::: {.domain-hero}

::: {.logo-text}
[CRAIOVA]{.logo-craiova} [TEEN HUB]{.logo-teenhub}
:::

# Inscrie-te

::: {.tagline}
Completeaza formularul si rezerva-ti locul.
:::

:::

::: {.form-section}

::: {.form-container}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/maqpdzbv" method="POST">

<div class="form-group">
<label for="name">Nume si prenume <span class="required">*</span></label>
<input type="text" id="name" name="name" required placeholder="Ex: Popescu Maria">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="school">Liceul si specializarea <span class="required">*</span></label>
<input type="text" id="school" name="school" required placeholder="Ex: Liceul SRB, Matematica-Informatica">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label>Confirm ca sunt elev/a inmatriculat/a in clasa a IX-a <span class="required">*</span></label>
<div class="radio-group">
<label class="radio-label"><input type="radio" name="confirm_clasa" value="Da" required> Da</label>
<label class="radio-label"><input type="radio" name="confirm_clasa" value="Nu"> Nu</label>
</div>
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="phone">Numar de telefon participant <span class="required">*</span></label>
<input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" required placeholder="07XX XXX XXX">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="parent-phone">Numar de telefon parinte <span class="required">*</span></label>
<input type="tel" id="parent-phone" name="parent_phone" required placeholder="07XX XXX XXX">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="allergies">Alergii declarate <span class="required">*</span></label>
<input type="text" id="allergies" name="allergies" required placeholder="Ex: Nu am / Gluten, lactoza...">
</div>

<div class="form-group">
<label for="expectations">Asteptari de la eveniment <span class="required">*</span></label>
<input type="text" id="expectations" name="expectations" required placeholder="Ce speri sa castigi din aceasta experienta?">
</div>

<div class="form-group consent-group">
<label>Datele colectate prin acest formular vor fi utilizate exclusiv in scopul organizarii evenimentului Craiova Teen Hub — IdeaMarathon. Sunt de acord cu prelucrarea datelor personale. <span class="required">*</span></label>
<div class="radio-group">
<label class="radio-label"><input type="radio" name="consent" value="Da" required> Da</label>
<label class="radio-label"><input type="radio" name="consent" value="Nu"> Nu</label>
</div>
</div>

<button type="submit" class="form-submit">TRIMITE INSCRIEREA</button>

</form>

:::

:::

<button class="scroll-top" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" aria-label="Scroll to top">&#8593;</button>
<footer class="site-footer"><div class="footer-inner"><div class="footer-col footer-brand"><div class="footer-logo"><span class="logo-craiova">CRAIOVA</span> <span class="logo-teenhub">TEEN HUB</span></div><p class="footer-tagline">Un proiect al elevilor Liceului SRB</p></div><div class="footer-col"><h4>Navigare</h4><ul><li><a href="index.html">Acasa</a></li><li><a href="index.html#teme">Teme</a></li><li><a href="index.html#program">Program</a></li><li><a href="index.html#premii">Premii</a></li></ul></div><div class="footer-col"><h4>Domenii</h4><ul><li><a href="comunitate.html">Comunitate</a></li><li><a href="sanatate.html">Sanatate</a></li><li><a href="mediu.html">Mediu & Oras</a></li><li><a href="media-digitala.html">Media digitala</a></li><li><a href="educatie.html">Educatie</a></li><li><a href="tehnologie.html">Tehnologie</a></li></ul></div><div class="footer-col"><h4>Inscrie-te</h4><p class="footer-cta-text">21-22 Martie 2026</p><a href="inscriere.html" class="footer-cta">INSCRIE-TE ACUM</a></div></div><div class="footer-bottom"><p>Idea Marathon 2026 &mdash; Liceul SRB, Craiova</p></div></footer>
